summary: DPA page displays correct content structure with proper headings, effective date, sections, and navigation. Visual treatment uses diner palette appropriately for legal content. Minor palette deviation from strict brand guidelines noted.

violations.description: Page uses cream background (#fff8ea) for the main content card which aligns with legal route palette expectations, though the overall page background appears to use the correct diner teal (#9fd8d2)

actions: Verify the cream card treatment matches the intended legal longform article styling from the manifesto
Confirm support email link functionality in shared legal footer
Test mobile narrow contract at 390px viewport
